headline: Palantir’s 625% Run Up. Who Cares About Controversy?
summary: Even amid the recent sell-off that dented the market, Palantir’s (NASDAQ: PLTR) stock has outperformed the S&P by a remarkably large margin. Shares are up 550% in the last few years. headline: Palantir and GE Aerospace Are Working Together on Military Aircraft. Is PLTR or GE Stock a Better Buy Here?
summary: Palantir offers higher‑growth, higher‑volatility upside as an AI defense software pure play, while GE Aerospace provides steadier, cash‑rich exposure to aircraft and engine demand; which is “better” depends on whether you prioritize aggressive capital gains (PLTR) or more predictable compounding with a dividend (GE).
